title: MirrorStatus
description: Synchronization status for a single mirrored repository served by the Tsinghua TUNA mirror (tunasync).

is_master.description: Whether this mirror is a master (primary) sync job.

status.description: Current synchronization status of the mirror.

last_update.description: Human-readable timestamp of the last successful update.

last_update_ts.description: Unix epoch seconds of the last successful update.

last_started.description: Human-readable timestamp of when the most recent sync run started.

last_started_ts.description: Unix epoch seconds of when the most recent sync run started.

last_ended.description: Human-readable timestamp of when the most recent sync run ended.

last_ended_ts.description: Unix epoch seconds of when the most recent sync run ended.

next_schedule.description: Human-readable timestamp of the next scheduled sync run.

next_schedule_ts.description: Unix epoch seconds of the next scheduled sync run; may be negative when unscheduled.

upstream.description: Upstream source URL the mirror synchronizes from.

size.description: Human-readable on-disk size of the mirror.
